howToPlay.title: How to Play?
howToPlay.step1Desc: Choose the number of players and imposters.
howToPlay.step2Desc: Select the category you want to play.
howToPlay.step3Desc: Each player looks at their phone to see their word/question.
howToPlay.step4Desc: Discuss and try to find who the imposter is!

slide1.title: Welcome to Imposter Party! 🎉
slide1.description: The most fun social deduction game to play with friends! Find the imposter or survive as one.

slide2.title: Who's the Imposter? 🕵️
slide2.description: One player doesn't know the secret word - they're the imposter! Everyone else sees the same word, but the imposter only knows the category.
slide2.highlight: The imposter must bluff to survive!

slide3.title: Q&A Round 💬
slide3.description: Take turns asking each other questions. Questions should relate to the word but not be too obvious - the imposter might guess it!
slide3.highlight: Example: 'How often do you do this?'

slide4.title: Voting Time ✋
slide4.description: After discussion, everyone votes for who they think is the imposter. The player with the most votes is eliminated!
slide4.highlight: Ties mean no one is eliminated!

slide5.title: Ready to Play? 🏆
slide5.description: Find the imposter and collect points! Different categories, special modes and more await you.
slide5.highlight: Troll Mode: Sometimes everyone is the imposter! 😈

setup.wordGameDesc: Find who doesn't know the word

game.discussSubtitle: Ask questions and discuss to find the imposter
game.passPhone: Pass the phone to the next player

animals.hint3: You see it at the zoo
